title: Demo Post by an Author
content:
This is just a test post by an user with the author role, lets see how this works. Already I see an issue with not having permissions for pages, media and other items I had checkmarked when I adjusted the users permissions.

    // Single post page
    $post = get_post($post_slug);
    if ($post) {
        render_theme('post', ['post' => $post, 'config' => $config]);
    } else {
        header("HTTP/1.0 404 Not Found");
        die('Post not found');
    }
excerpt: This is just a test post by an user with the author role, lets see how this works.
